scope: Bereishis Perek 1 approved first-pass input candidates

allowed_intents: ask for the basic meaning of one reviewed Hebrew token
use only reviewed or source-supported meaning
use context phrase only as support
forbidden_intents: combine multiple vocabulary tokens in one item
generate answer choices or answer keys
vocabulary_meaning.family_policy_review_note: Yossi approved the family-level wording policy only. This is not question approval, answer-key approval, protected-preview approval, reviewed-bank approval, runtime approval, or student-facing approval.

allowed_intents: identify a simple reviewed noun token
keep grammar language at the approved basic level
forbidden_intents: ask about constructs, suffixes, adjectives, or advanced grammar unless separately reviewed
treat every vocabulary row as automatically question-safe
generate answer choices or answer keys
basic_noun_recognition.family_policy_review_note: Yossi approved the family-level wording policy only. This is not question approval, answer-key approval, protected-preview approval, reviewed-bank approval, runtime approval, or student-facing approval.

allowed_intents: ask about the function of את as a direct-object marker
recognize that את points to the object receiving the action
use only clean token-level direct-object-marker rows
forbidden_intents: ask what את means as a simple English translation
combine את with conjunction or prefix analysis unless separately approved
generate answer choices or answer keys
direct_object_marker_recognition.family_policy_review_note: Yossi approved the family-level wording policy only. This is not question approval, answer-key approval, protected-preview approval, reviewed-bank approval, runtime approval, or student-facing approval.
required_cautions: must not ask what את means as a simple translation
must not translate את as the
must not translate את as with
must require future exact wording review

allowed_intents: ask for the root of one reviewed Hebrew token
use clean token-level verified root candidates
prefer visible roots appropriate for students
forbidden_intents: ask root for unresolved or compound forms
ask root where prefixes or suffixes make the token too hard without separate approval
ask advanced binyan or stem questions
generate answer choices or answer keys
shoresh_identification.family_policy_review_note: Yossi approved the family-level wording policy only. This is not question approval, answer-key approval, protected-preview approval, reviewed-bank approval, runtime approval, or student-facing approval.

basic_verb_form_recognition.family_policy_review_note: Kept deferred. Morphology/basic verb-form questions require a separate morphology-question wording standard.
